description_long: This house features a multi-section layout with a prominent attached garage at the front, a paved driveway, and a series of steps leading to the main entrance. The roof is primarily a dark hip style, with additional flat and gable roof sections over the extended wings. The exterior walls are finished in a light neutral color, complemented by darker roofing and some wooden accent elements. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with a mix of standard rectangular panes and larger openings, providing ample natural light. The property is enclosed by a low boundary wall, and there are visible outdoor living spaces, including a patio and deck area. The overall design suggests a blend of modern and suburban residential architectural influences.
description: A modern suburban house with a hip roof, attached garage, light-colored walls, and a mix of window arrangements. Features include a paved driveway, steps, and outdoor living spaces within a low boundary wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage, driveway, and steps leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, side windows, and the extended wing with patio and deck areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the enclosed backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hip roof, side entrance, and more of the outdoor living spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of standard and large windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and a single front door adjacent to the garage
